message:
test(engine): bring claim_atom_lattice enrichment to 22 tests (all 441 modules now ≥20)

Add 3 enrichment tests: empty evaluation result, evaluation determinism,
and ClaimState serde roundtrip for all 4 variants. This closes the last
module below the 20-test enrichment floor.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
